name: Forbion European Acquisition Corp. Warrants
summary: Forbion European Acquisition Corp. Warrants represents the right to purchase shares of the company's common stock at a specified price and within a specific timeframe. These warrants are often issued as part of a unit offering in conjunction with the company's initial public offering (IPO). Forbion European Acquisition Corp. is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) that focuses on the healthcare industry in Europe.
